collision energy: CID (35% collision energy) was used for MS2 fragmentation
enrichment method: we used antibodies against SIRT6 to immuno‐precipitate SIRT6‐interacting proteins
fragmentation method: HCD (60% collision energy) was used for MS3 detection of TMT groups
instrument: using a 30 cm homemade column packed with 1.8 μm C‐18 beads to resolve the peptides.
labeling: analyzed by mass spectrometry with tandem mass tags (TMT) to permit accurate quantitation
